title: ジャパンカップの後に・頂点へ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week claims victory against El Condor
Pasa at the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They praise each other over a great race with a
firm handshake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, as Special Week heads home, Grass
Wonder appears and challenges her to determine
who is stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so it is that Special Week steps up to race
against Grass Wonder the Beast at the Arima
Kinen!
